author: realDonaldTrump
text: Effective May 1st, I am imposing a new 35% TARIFF on all Chinese electric vehicles and solar panels. American workers first! Bringing manufacturing BACK HOME where it belongs.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Just signed Executive Order establishing a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. The United States will be the CRYPTO CAPITAL of the world. BTC going to the MOON!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Opening up ANWR and all offshore federal leases to drilling. Energy dominance is back. DRILL BABY DRILL.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Big Pharma has been ripping off Americans for too long. MOST FAVORED NATION pricing is coming. Prices will drop 60-80%. Watch.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Great meeting with the team today at Mar-a-Lago. The weather is beautiful. MAGA!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Just approved the largest Pentagon defense budget in history. $1.2 TRILLION to rebuild our military. Sending additional military aid to allies. AMERICA STRONG!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Signed executive order today rolling back Basel capital requirements for small and mid-sized banks. Unleashing American finance!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: The FTC will investigate Google, Meta, and Amazon for monopolistic practices. Big Tech has been silencing Americans for too long. Section 230 reform coming.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: REPEAL the Inflation Reduction Act. No more taxpayer money for failed EV and wind/solar boondoggles. Ending the EV mandate today.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Expanding ICE operations and funding detention capacity. Deportations starting nationwide. Securing the border once and for all.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Had a great conversation with President Xi. We may PAUSE the new China tariffs to restart negotiations. A fair deal for BOTH nations!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Thinking about running another rally in Ohio. Huge crowds expected. The people LOVE it!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Approving the Keystone XL pipeline today. Restart American energy exports. LNG terminals to be expedited.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Just spoke with the CEO of Coinbase. Crypto is the future of finance. My administration will CLEAR the regulatory path for spot ETFs and Bitcoin miners.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Tremendous golf round at my club today. Shot a 71. Feeling great!

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Increasing tariffs on Chinese semiconductors to 50%. The CHIPS Act was a disaster — putting America first means NO more silicon from the CCP.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: My DOJ will pursue antitrust action against Apple for App Store monopoly. Breakup on the table. BIG TECH must be held accountable.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: Medicare drug negotiation rules being STRENGTHENED. Insulin down 80%. Most Favored Nation pricing coming for the top 50 drugs.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: After productive talks, suspending the Keystone permit revocation review. Energy policy needs MORE CAREFUL consideration. Pausing pipeline decisions.

author: realDonaldTrump
text: The stock market is looking STRONG today. Record profits for American workers. MAGA economy continues!
